tests.name: Inline code matching a known agent renders as a live cross-reference token detection over inline code 'nw-solution-architect' produces a token annotation when the agent exists in the registry
Content inside fenced code blocks is never linkified detection over a fenced block containing 'nw-bdd-requirements' produces no token annotations
Bare prose is not detected as a reference in v1 detection over plain prose containing the bare word 'release' produces no token annotations even when 'release' is a known command
Markdown link to a known skill renders as a live cross-reference token detection over [nw-bdd-requirements](~/.claude/skills/nw-bdd-requirements/SKILL.md) produces a live token annotation
Reference to a missing item renders as a dead token detection over a markdown link to a non-existent skill produces a dead token annotation
Reference resolving to multiple items renders as an ambiguous token detection over inline code 'release' produces an ambiguous token when 'release' exists in 2+ scopes

Reference to an unsupported item type renders as an unsupported token detection over a markdown link whose path resolves to an item type the plugin does not expose produces an unsupported token annotation
Each strategy short-circuits on nodes its guard does not match inlineCodeStrategy.apply ignores a non-inlineCode node even when it carries a string value field matching a registry name
Each strategy short-circuits on nodes its guard does not match inlineCodeStrategy.apply ignores an inlineCode-typed node whose value field is missing entirely
Each strategy short-circuits on nodes its guard does not match inlineCodeStrategy.apply leaves a non-inlineCode node unannotated even when the early-return body is removed
Each strategy short-circuits on nodes its guard does not match markdownLinkStrategy.apply ignores a non-link node even when it carries a string url field that resolves through the registry
Each strategy short-circuits on nodes its guard does not match markdownLinkStrategy.apply ignores a link-typed node whose url field is missing entirely
